clock_reset: start a 10 ns cocotb clock on clk
drive all inputs to known zero values
deassert rst and wait 8 cycles before stimulus
driver: drive s_axi_aid, s_axi_aaddr, s_axi_aprot, and s_axi_aqos
hold s_axi_avalid high until the DUT raises s_axi_aready
hold output ready signals low for directed backpressure cycles
consume m_axi/m_wc/m_rc outputs in both simultaneous and staggered ready orders
pulse s_cpl_valid for successful decoded transactions to release outstanding counts
scoreboard: decode address by comparing ADDR[31:24] against the configured base-address table
for M2, require APROT[1] == 0 or expect decode error
for valid hits, expect m_select and m_wc_select to equal the decoded master and m_axi_aregion to equal the decoded region
for decode errors, expect no m_axi_avalid and both write/reply command decode-error indicators high
for held output ready, expect command valid signals to remain asserted
directed_stress: keep one ID outstanding to one destination, then issue the same ID to another destination and verify it blocks until completion
leave four unique IDs outstanding so all generated thread slots are allocated
fill S_ACCEPT with same-ID same-destination commands, then issue another command and verify it blocks until a completion pulse
exercise secure-access rejection on both M2 regions
